items.name: apollo-vertex-theme
items.title: Apollo Vertex Theme
items.description: Apollo Vertex design system tokens — colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and easing functions with light and dark mode support.

items.name: font-inter
items.title: Inter Font
items.description: Inter font configuration for Apollo Vertex. Sets --font-sans CSS variable.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal content.

items.name: charts-core
items.title: Charts Core
items.description: Shared chart infrastructure: DataAdapter interface, chart-data types, configurations, format helpers, and the ChartLoadingBoundary primitive consumed by every chart.

items.name: data-fabric-adapter
items.title: Data Fabric Adapter
items.description: DataAdapter implementation that talks to UiPath Data Fabric. Pair with any chart from charts-core.

items.name: insights-adapter
items.title: Insights Adapter
items.description: DataAdapter implementation that talks to the UiPath Insights standalone-query API. Pair with any chart from charts-core.

items.name: line-chart
items.title: Line Chart
items.description: A time-series line chart over a datetime dimension.

items.name: multi-line-chart
items.title: Multi-Line Chart
items.description: Two metrics on a shared datetime axis with independent Y axes.

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart
items.description: A metric broken down by a categorical dimension.

items.name: distribution-chart
items.title: Distribution Chart
items.description: A histogram over a numeric or datetime dimension.

items.name: kpi-chart
items.title: KPI Chart
items.description: A single scalar metric (count, sum, average, min, max).

items.name: table-chart
items.title: Table Chart
items.description: A sortable table of entity rows.

items.name: ai-chat
items.title: AI Chat
items.description: A composable AI chat UI component for TanStack AI with AgentHub adapter, markdown rendering, suggestion buttons, and error display

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Displays content within a desired ratio.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: button

items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: Groups multiple buttons together.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer. Supports solid, glass, and selectable variants.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Beautiful charts using Recharts with consistent theming.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

items.name: combobox

items.description: An autocomplete input with a filterable list, supporting single and multi-select with badges.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: A command menu for searching and executing commands.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Displays a menu located at the pointer, triggered by a right-click.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A data table component built on TanStack Table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, and column reordering.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that appears in front of app content.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A drawer component that slides in from the edge of the screen.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: An empty state component for when there's no data to display.

items.name: feedback-vote-widget
items.title: Feedback Vote Widget
items.description: A thumbs up/down feedback control with an optional comment textarea, designed for the UiPath Platform Feedback API.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: A form field component with label, input, and description.

items.name: filter-dropdown
items.title: Filter Dropdown
items.description: A versatile filter dropdown with multi-select, single-select, search, and optional TanStack Table column integration.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

items.name: input

items.description: Displays a form input field.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group

items.description: A one-time password input component.

items.name: item
items.title: Item
items.description: A list item component for displaying content in lists.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Displays keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: A horizontally stacked menu bar with dropdown submenus.

items.name: metric-card
items.title: Metric Card
items.description: Displays a labeled metric with value, optional trend indicator, and percentage change badge.

items.name: onboarding-tour-joyride
items.title: Onboarding Tour (Joyride)
items.description: Guided onboarding tour built on React Joyride with an Apollo Vertex–styled custom tooltip, welcome modal, and conditional step gating.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: A navigation menu with dropdown support.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

items.name: page-header

items.description: A compound page header with back button, title, metadata fields, and collapsible action buttons that overflow into a dropdown.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons where no more than one can be checked.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that slides in.

items.name: shell
items.title: Shell
items.description: Provides UiPath authentication and renders children only when authenticated.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useMobile
items.description: A React hook for checking if the screen is mobile.

items.name: use-data-table
items.title: useDataTable
items.description: A generic data table hook that manages sorting, filtering, pagination, column visibility, and column order with localStorage persistence.

items.name: use-entity-data-table
items.title: useEntityDataTable
items.description: A data table hook for VSS entities that fetches live data from collections and builds column definitions from entity metadata.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: A composable, themeable and customizable sidebar component.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: An opinionated toast component for React.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: A loading spinner component.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between on and off.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A responsive table component.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content shown one at a time.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: A composition-first form built on TanStack Form and Zod with Apollo-bound field components and translatable validation errors.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A composable step indicator for multi-step flows with horizontal and vertical orientations and active, completed, and inactive states.

items.name: form-wizard
items.title: Form Wizard
items.description: A multi-step wizard built on TanStack Form and Zod. Each step is composed with withForm and validates its own slice through a FormGroup, with conditional steps and optional persistence.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: A date picker component.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A calendar component.

items.name: feature-flag-provider
items.title: Feature Flag Provider
items.description: Generic feature flag provider with Proteus SDK integration, reactive listeners, and environment-based switching.

items.name: use-feature-flag
items.title: useFeatureFlag
items.description: React hook that reads a feature flag value and reactively updates when the flag changes.

items.name: feature-flag-guard
items.title: FeatureFlagGuard
items.description: Wrapper component that conditionally renders children based on a feature flag value.

items.name: protected-feature-route
items.title: ProtectedFeatureRoute
items.description: Route-level guard that throws an error when a feature flag is disabled.

items.name: solution-tests
items.title: Solution Tests
items.description: Page-level view for managing UiPath Solution Tests — test cases, batch runs, KPI trend, run-result baselines, and adopt/update/remove actions. Domain-neutral: the smart container reads the generic UiPathST* entity collections from your vs-core solution via collection-backed hooks, and the subject entity is parameterized via SolutionTestsConfig.
